page_about.title: Who we are
page_about.subtitle: We transform complex ideas into simple and beautiful digital products.
page_about.p1: At Guro, we are a team of developers and designers passionate about technology and visual aesthetics.
page_about.p2: We believe in software as a tool to empower businesses, eliminating daily friction through efficient and robust code solutions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the average execution time?
faq.a1: Depending on the project scope, we can launch an MVP in 4-6 weeks.
faq.a2: Yes, we provide metrics monitoring, security, and continuous monthly scalability.
faq.q3: What is the minimum initial investment?
faq.a3: Our core projects start from custom models based on your budget (starting at $1500 USD).
faq.q4: How do you measure project success?
faq.a4: We set KPIs in the discovery phase (CRO, retention, or load time) to guarantee your ROI.

audit_cta.title: Is your technology driving or stalling your business?
audit_cta.subtitle: 100% COMPLIMENTARY IT STRATEGIC AUDIT
audit_cta.item1_desc: We identify manual processes and bottlenecks that are limiting your company's scalability.
audit_cta.item2_desc: We evaluate your current infrastructure, management systems, and the feasibility of custom solutions.
audit_cta.item3_desc: We analyze your digital identity perception, user experience (UX), and conversion rates.
audit_cta.item4_desc: We provide a 90-day action plan to modernize and scale through technology.
